title: copy date column into subitems
excerpt: I need to give subitems the same due date as the item. I have set up automations so that the subitems are generated to specific people automatically when status changes, but I need to give it the same due date which is a…

posts.author: K.Maiorca (Katherine)
posts.cookedHtml: I need to give subitems the same due date as the item. I have set up automations so that the subitems are generated to specific people automatically when status changes, but I need to give it the same due date which is already on the item level. how do I do this? I cannot use any apps or integrations due to organisational restrictions

posts.author: MCautreels (Maarten Cautreels - Tryve)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Katherina,

Unfortunately, as far as I know, this is currently not possible without the use of apps or an API integration using a tool like Make.com

Best,

Maarten
